headline: 《火遮眼》领衔今日影市，多片争锋
headlineEn: ‘Fire Shrouds the Eyes’ Leads Today’s Box Office, Multiple Films Compete
summary: 今日两部新片上映，《火遮眼》与《草原上的小木屋》表现亮眼；本周《痴迷》持续霸榜，多部新片蓄势待发。
summaryEn: Two new films released today, with ‘Fire Shrouds the Eyes’ and ‘Little House on the Prairie’ shining; ‘Obsession’ continues to dominate the weekly chart, while several new titles gear up.

industryHighlights.text: 《火遮眼》首日票房破千万，口碑两极
industryHighlights.en: ‘Fire Shrouds the Eyes’ grosses over 10 million on opening day, with mixed reviews.

industryHighlights.text: 《玩具总动员5》本周持续热映，全球累计超5亿美元
industryHighlights.en: ‘Toy Story 5’ continues its hot run this week, crossing $500 million globally.

industryHighlights.text: 《权力的游戏前传：龙族》新季预告释出，粉丝热议
industryHighlights.en: New trailer for ‘House of the Dragon’ drops, sparking fan buzz.

industryHighlights.text: 《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》定档2027年，导演确认回归
industryHighlights.en: ‘Spider-Man: Brand New Day’ set for 2027, director confirmed to return.

industryHighlights.text: 《安昂传奇：最后的气宗》真人剧首曝剧照
industryHighlights.en: First look at ‘Avatar: The Last Airbender’ live-action series revealed.
